title: Nuke old dashboard.ts + retarget sweech dashboard command
description: Delete src/dashboard.ts. sweech dashboard now starts fed daemon + opens browser to new React app. Update README and AGENTS.md mentions.

context.text: Done via /vy-go 2026-05-20. Deleted src/dashboard.ts and retargeted sweech dashboard to the React dashboard served by the fed server on localhost-only startup. Attach path now probes /dashboard/state before treating EADDRINUSE as an existing dashboard; non-dashboard port collisions exit non-zero. Updated README and product docs. Proof: npm test -- --runInBand = 97 suites passed, 2358 passed, 5 skipped; npm run build passed; npx tsc --noEmit passed; npm audit --audit-level=moderate found 0 vulnerabilities; cd macos-menubar/SweechBar && swift build passed; git diff --check passed. E2E: dist/cli.js dashboard served http://127.0.0.1:47921/, /dashboard/state returned JSON, screenshot saved at ~/Desktop/screenshots/sweech/dashboard-retarget-T-DASH-007-2026-05-20.png. Reviews: code review blocker fixed; Codex adversarial review reported no blocking findings.
